title: Bird Vehicle
description: A single free-floating Bird vehicle as returned in the GBFS free_bike_status feed. Bird operates electric scooters and electric-assist bicycles; a vehicle's form factor is resolved by joining vehicle_type_id against the vehicle_types feed.

bike_id.description: Anonymized rotating identifier per GBFS PII guidance.

is_reserved.description: True when the vehicle is currently reserved by a rider.

is_disabled.description: True when the vehicle is taken out of service (low battery, damage, maintenance).

vehicle_type_id.description: References a vehicle_type_id from the vehicle_types feed.

current_range_meters.description: Estimated remaining range in meters based on battery state.

last_reported.description: POSIX timestamp of the last vehicle telemetry update.
